vars.preheader: Welcome to Arquantix — here is how to get started.

hero.title: Welcome to Arquantix.
hero.kicker: Premium real assets, structured into transparent on-chain vaults.

vars.greetingTitle: Glad to have you on board, Sarah.
vars.greetingBody: Your account is ready. From now on, you can browse vaults, simulate allocations, and subscribe to exclusive offers — all from one secured client space, without ever managing a wallet.

steps.title: Complete your KYC profile
steps.body: We ask a few documents to comply with EU and Swiss regulations. Most clients finish this in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Compose your first vault
steps.body: Use Vault Builder to allocate across gold, real estate, credit and tokenized treasuries — with simulated performance.

steps.title: Talk to a desk advisor
steps.body: Our Geneva desk is available for a 30-minute call to walk you through your portfolio and answer your questions.

cta.title: We answer in less than 4 hours.
cta.body: Reach the Arquantix desk directly — by email, secure chat or scheduled call.

footer.tagline: Premium real assets, structured into transparent on-chain vaults.
